channel.title: Practices on MacReiben Web Zone
channel.description: Recent content in Practices on MacReiben Web Zone

item.title: Unit test FIRST principles
item.description:
I’m going to write a serie of memos about clean code practices. Here is the first one, the FIRST principles.

The FIRST principles are recommendations to use when you create unit tests. It defines how a unit test should be.

item.title: Green addict
item.description:
I use tests frameworks all the time. Whether I do TDD or try a code sample. It’s the faster way isn’t it ?

I become a “green addict”. I feel unconfortable when I’m not seeing green dots on my test runner - or when I do not see red dots when I change code (which frightens me much more).
